title: Re-express existing checks as default rules with [validation] aliases
description:
Implements decision record (dev/active/f6a704d0-validation-engine.md) section 8.3.

## Success Criteria

- [hard] The COMPLETE set of existing checks is re-expressed as default rules: type-label requirement, label format, namespace-registry, orphan-leaf, strategic-label consistency, and per-namespace allowed-values/value-pattern/uniqueness/required.
- [hard] Default rules preserve today's warn-vs-reject behavior via enforce (default false); parity is covered by tests.
- [hard] No legacy [validation] or [namespaces] enforcement remains hard-coded in validation.rs/validate.rs.
